evidence.q1: Sections 1 through 13 are sequential; cross-reference in Section 10 resolves to itself.
evidence.q2: 'Representatives' is capitalized as a defined term but never defined.
evidence.q3: No vague or non-commercial time/quantity phrasing found; 'prompt' is commercial and specific timeframes are stated.
evidence.q4: No archaic or out-of-register legal diction; the language is modern and consistent.
evidence.q5: No internally contradictory or grammatically broken sentences found.
evidence.q6: Register is consistently plain English and modern across all sections; no authorial shift.
